headline: Intel (INTC) Valuation Check After A Volatile Month And Mixed Fundamental Signals
summary: Intel stock performance snapshot Intel (INTC) has been on many investors’ radar after a period of mixed share performance, with the stock down 6.2% over the past day but up 58.8% over the past month. See our latest analysis for Intel. Despite the recent 6.2% single day share price decline and a 12.9% drop over the past week, Intel’s 30 day share price return of 58.8% and very large 1 year total shareholder return suggest momentum has been strong, even if short term sentiment looks more...

headline: Trump tells Fortune he should have asked for bigger Intel stake
summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said he "should have asked for more" of a stake in ‌Intel on behalf of the U.S. government, in an ‌interview with Fortune magazine published on Monday.  The Trump administration last year took ​a 10% stake in Intel and announced an investment of about $10 billion in the chipmaker for building or expanding factories in the U.S.  Eight months after the deal, the government’s Intel position ‌has grown to ⁠be worth more than $50 billion.

content.title: Trump tells Fortune he should have asked for bigger Intel stake
content.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said he "should have asked for more" of a stake in ‌Intel on behalf of the U.S. government, in an ‌interview with Fortune magazine published on Monday.  The Trump administration last year took ​a 10% stake in Intel and announced an investment of about $10 billion in the chipmaker for building or expanding factories in the U.S.  Eight months after the deal, the government’s Intel position ‌has grown to ⁠be worth more than $50 billion.
